meta.title: Issa KANE — AI & Data Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Issa KANE, AI & Data engineer. EFREI Paris, Machine Learning & Big Data.

hero.name: Issa KANE
hero.signature: I build data pipelines and ML systems.
hero.subtitle: AI & Data Engineer | EFREI Paris

story.title: My story
story.intro: Born in Senegal, high school diploma with honors in Dakar, then EFREI Paris in integrated prep class.

chapter1.title: Commercial Prospector | Aérial Group
chapter1.text: Company specializing in electronic security. B2B teleprospecting: scheduling appointments for security solutions. First pro experience — learning business, discipline and communication.

chapter2.title: From observation to building
chapter2.text: Two years later at SFR as systems engineer. Built a Kafka/Elasticsearch pipeline from scratch and integrated ML for anomaly detection in production.

chapter3.title: Master 1 | Machine Learning & Big Data
chapter3.text: Master 1 at EFREI, specializing in AI & Data. End-to-end projects: data pipelines, ML models, and production systems.

bullets: Developed a Python/Flask web app for IS performance tracking and management
Data pipelines with Kafka + Elasticsearch integration
Integrated ML models for anomaly detection and performance optimization
Strategic project presented to management, led autonomously
sfr_engineer.impact: Full pipeline Kafka → Elasticsearch → ML → Prometheus alerting, presented to SFR management

petfinder.title: PetFinder
petfinder.description: Pet adoption platform with authentication, listing management, and real-time multi-criteria search.
petfinder.impact: Spring Boot + MyBatis backend, Vue.js SPA frontend

bookreco.title: Book Recommendation System
bookreco.description: Recommendation engine combining content analysis and user behavior.

cproject.title: Recommendations in C
cproject.description: User mood analysis to suggest movies and books. Low-level implementation, no framework.
cproject.impact: Manual memory management and custom algorithms

sfr.title: SFR IS App
sfr.description: IS performance dashboard with real-time anomaly detection. Presented to SFR management.
sfr.impact: Full pipeline Kafka → ES → ML → alerting, in production environment

sad.title: SAD — Brain Tumors
sad.description: Decision Support System for brain tumor diagnosis from MRI scans. Predicts tumor type with a calibrated confidence score and generates patient reports.
sad.impact: CNN + Temperature Scaling calibration · 4 classes · 20 patient reports generated

metavideosync.title: MetaVideoSync
metavideosync.description: React Native app that scans the phone gallery and automatically identifies videos filmed with Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses using a 2-pass classification pipeline.
metavideosync.impact: Native Swift + Kotlin modules · network-free Pass 1 · pnpm monorepo

fitness.title: Discipline | 26 months of fitness
fitness.text: 26 months of consistent training. I code like I train: methodical, patient, and focused on progress.

football.title: Team spirit | Football since age 7
football.text: Football taught me that results are collective. Same in code: I listen, communicate, and build for the team.

curiosity.title: Curiosity & Autonomy
curiosity.text: I learn what I need, fast and independently: pure C, LangChain, GLSL. And I share what I learn.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Question, idea, collab. I read everything.
